name: Marylene's Fallacy
flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of Plenty
explicitMods: Recover an additional 18% of Flask's Life Recovery Amount over 10 seconds if used while not on Full Life
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of the Antitoxin
explicitMods: Grants Immunity to Poison for 6 seconds if used while Poisoned
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Foulborn Skin of the Lords
explicitMods: You can only Socket Corrupted Gems in this item
flavourText: The Lords are chosen so carefully.
Only they may grace His flesh.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills, or spell skills that deal damage.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 80% less Critical Strike Chance
Supported Skills deal 39% more Spell Damage
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

name: Svalinn
explicitMods: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
flavourText: The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

properties.name: Warcry, AoE, Duration, Fire, Attack, Melee, Trigger

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a warcry, taunting nearby enemies to attack the user and exerting subsequent attacks. The user and nearby allies gain a buff that grants a portion of their physical damage as extra fire damage. In addition to being taunted, enemies are inflicted with a secondary debuff causing them to explode when they die, dealing fire damage in an area.
explicitMods: Explosion deals Base Fire Damage equal to 8% of the Monster's maximum Life
Counts total Power of Enemies in Range

Buff grants gain 5% of Physical Damage as
Extra Fire Damage per 5 power, counting a maximum of 25 Power
Exerts the next 6 Melee Attacks you perform
Exerted Attacks Trigger Combust the first time they deal a Melee Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: 60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
This Skill is Triggered by Attacks Exerted by Infernal Cry
hybrid.secDescrText: Deals attack damage in an area.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
You have Replenishing Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Oblivion Turn
implicitMods: 30% of Damage from your Hits cannot be Reflected
Item sells for much more to vendors
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -8 to Total Mana Cost

implicitMods: +4% to Quality of Socketed Lightning Gems

explicitMods: 10% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Engulfs you in magical fire that rapidly burns you and nearby enemies. Your spell damage is substantially increased while under this effect. The effect ends when you have 1 life remaining.

Deals 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield as Base Fire Damage per second
You Burn for 90% of your Maximum Life per second as Fire Damage
You Burn for 70% of your Maximum Energy Shield per second as Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods:

hybrid.secDescrText: Sacrifices a portion of your Life and Energy Shield to engulf you in magical fire that rapidly burns nearby enemies for a duration. Your spell damage is increased while under this effect.

You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.
